no_changes_rationale:
verification_command: cd cli && go test ./... && lefthook run pre-commit

The requested behavior is already present in the current branch, so no code changes were needed for this attempt.

Evidence:
- `cli/internal/metric/store.go:85-143` already refuses mixed units in `Compare` and `Trend` via `singleHistoryUnit`, and already groups history by unit in `GroupedHistory`.
- `cli/internal/metric/store.go:246-290` already emits the clear `metric %q has mixed units: ...` error and preserves per-unit record order.
- `cli/internal/metric/store_test.go:197-211` already covers mixed-unit refusal plus unit grouping at the store level.
- `cli/cmd/metric_acceptance_test.go:70-145` already covers the end-to-end round-trip from metric definition to `exec run` to populated history to `metric show`.
- `cli/cmd/metric_acceptance_test.go:148-209` already covers mixed-unit refusal in `metric compare` and `metric trend`, and JSON history grouped by unit.

Verification already run successfully:
- `cd cli && go test ./cmd -run 'TestMetricCommandsValidateRunHistoryAndCompare|TestMetricCommandsRefuseMixedUnitsAndGroupHistoryByUnit'`
- `cd cli && go test ./internal/metric/...`
- `cd cli && go test ./...`
- `cd cli && lefthook run pre-commit`
